case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. APRILLE R CABILAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABILAN, APRILLE R $6,327.08 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $324.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,576.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
